name: pm-flow-kit
description: A self-contained product management workflow plugin with mandatory context confirmation, research, boundary definition, requirement analysis, metrics definition, scenario catalog, use cases, end-to-end flow, PRD, design-system-backed HTML prototype, diagram, independent review, and writing polish skills.

interface.shortDescription: PM workflow kit with research, boundary, PRD, design-system prototypes, and review.
interface.longDescription: PM Flow Kit helps product teams and agents run staged product work with a self-contained workflow: context confirmation, research-stage context, boundary definition, requirement analysis, metrics definition, scenario catalog, use cases, end-to-end flow, artifact plan, PRD sizing, design-system-backed HTML prototype generation, optional prototype review artifacts, Mermaid diagrams, independent product review, and humanized product writing.
defaultPrompt: 启动一个产品需求流程
生成一个可评审的 HTML 原型
生成 research / boundary / review 阶段产物
